descriptions: The chief of Los Polacos is also one of the leaders of Los Diablos Rojos, indicating overlapping leadership.
edges.evidence_quote: According to 2006 research reports, 'Polaco' (the chief of the sub-group Los Polacos and one of the leaders of Los Diablos Rojos)

descriptions: Lab 110 is a parent organization of Lazarus Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Parent organization: Lab 110 and Bureau 121

descriptions: Zagari is allied with Viola.
edges.evidence_quote: È alleata dei Viola , anch'essi di Taurianova .

descriptions: Viola is part of the Avignone-Zagari-Fazzalari-Viola group.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 dicembre 2017 si conclude l'operazione Terramara-Closed che porta all'arresto di 44 persone ... presunte affiliate ai Avignone -Zagari-Fazzalari-Viola

descriptions: Viola (as part of Zagari-Viola) was in a violent feud with Asciutto-Neri-Grimaldi.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 2 luglio 1989 con l'uccisione di Rocco Neri scoppia una violenta faida tra gli Asciutto-Neri-Grimaldi e gli Zagari-Viola.

descriptions: Zagari-Fazzalari-Viola and Maio-Cianci are mentioned together in asset seizures, suggesting a cooperative link.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 15 gennaio 2018 vengono sequestrati beni a presunti affiliati degli Zagari-Fazzalari-Viola e Maio-Cianci , in correlazione all'operazione Terramara-Closed .

descriptions: The DeMeo crew was a subunit of the Gambino crime family, led by Gambino member Roy DeMeo.
edges.evidence_quote: Roy Albert DeMeo ... was an American mobster in the Gambino crime family of New York City. He headed a group known as the "DeMeo crew"

descriptions: The DeMeo crew was a subunit of the Gambino crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Roy Albert DeMeo was an American mobster in the Gambino crime family of New York City. He headed a group known as the "DeMeo crew".

descriptions: DeMeo was initially an associate of the Lucchese family before shifting allegiance to the Gambinos.
edges.evidence_quote: DeMeo was initially an associate of the Brooklyn faction of the Lucchese crime family

descriptions: DeMeo crew leader Roy DeMeo formed an alliance with the Westies on behalf of the Gambino family.
edges.evidence_quote: DeMeo secured his induction into the Gambino family by forming an alliance with an Irish-American gang known as the Westies

descriptions: The DeMeo crew was a crew within the Gambino family.
edges.evidence_quote: To maintain control over the Dellacroce faction, Castellano relied on the crew run by Anthony "Nino" Gaggi and Roy DeMeo.

descriptions: Chee Kung Tong and Kuomintang were in conflict after Sun Yat-sen shifted support to KMT, leading to tensions and criticism.
edges.evidence_quote: Sun reneged on his promise to assist the organization, and began supporting the Kuomintang (KMT) instead. The Chee Kung Tong criticized Sun, who in turn criticized the Chee Kung Tong and labeled them as being incompatible with republican China.

descriptions: Green Gang financially supported the Kuomintang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Green Gang was a major financial supporter of Chiang Kai-shek

descriptions: Hip Sings cooperated with Kuomintang in drug trafficking operations.
edges.evidence_quote: During the 1930s and 1940s, the Hip Sings were involved in drug trafficking operations with the Kuomintang (KMT) and later the Office of Policy Coordination (OPC).

descriptions: Năm Cam worked in Bảy Sy's casino, assisting in its operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Bảy Sy was released and soon opened a casino, where Năm Cam and Nguyễn Văn Nhã helped out to run the casino.

descriptions: Năm Cam's mob and Dung Hà's group were in conflict, leading to Năm Cam ordering her murder.
edges.evidence_quote: After a series of confrontations and standoffs between Dung Hà's group and Năm Cam's mob, Cam ordered the murder of Dung Hà.

descriptions: Huỳnh Tỳ's triad initiated Năm Cam into the criminal underworld.
edges.evidence_quote: Văn Cam was first initiated into the criminal underworld by Huỳnh Tỳ, a major player in the triads of Saigon at the time.

descriptions: Năm Cam planned to kill Tài chém, leading to a chase by Tài chém's gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Năm Cam, under the guidance of Bảy Sy planned to kill Tài chém, a notorious gangster in the first district of Saigon, but the plan failed and resulted in Năm Cam being chased by Tài chém's gang brothers.

descriptions: Năm Cam was a follower of Đại Cathay's mob, learning from him how to run casinos.
edges.evidence_quote: During his early years as a youth in Saigon, Năm Cam was a follower of the most infamous mob leader in Saigon during the 60s, Đại Cathay

descriptions: Easton Crew patched over to become a Bacchus chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: In January 2011, the Easton Crew based in Grand Falls 'patched over' to become the first Bacchus chapter in Newfoundland.

descriptions: Supreme White Alliance assisted IKA with hate rock gatherings but broke ties after Edwards' arrest.
edges.evidence_quote: the Supreme White Alliance, a white power skinhead group that had been assisting the IKA with annual hate rock gatherings, decided to break ties with the IKA after Edwards' arrest.

descriptions: The Persico faction was a warring faction within the Colombo family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Colombo crime family divided into two factions during the third family war (1991 to 1993).

descriptions: The two factions fought each other in the third Colombo family war.
edges.evidence_quote: The Colombo crime family divided into two factions during the third family war (1991 to 1993).

descriptions: Vancică clan challenged the Cămătari clan, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: To challenge the Cămătari clan, it is alleged that the leaders of the Vancică crime group formed an alliance with the Sportivilor clan and invested in acquiring cars and firearms.

descriptions: Gallico was allied with Imerti-Condello-Fontana in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: In quel periodo sono alleati con i Dinaro di Melicuccà, con i Pesce di Rosarno e gli Imerti - Condello -Fontana di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: Ah Kong was founded by former See Tong members and initially operated under See Tong flag.
edges.evidence_quote: Roland Tan and his brethren... founded Ah Kong but operated under the See Tong flag.

descriptions: Ang Soon Tong clashed with See Tong over a funeral banner.
edges.evidence_quote: In December 1995, Ang Soon Tong clashed with a rival gang, See Tong, over a funeral banner.

descriptions: See Tong attacked members of rival gang Pek Kim Leng, resulting in death and injury.
edges.evidence_quote: Roland Tan... and about ten of his fellow gang members from See Tong had armed themselves with machetes to attack two members of their rival gang, Pek Kim Leng

descriptions: La Raza Nation was in a gang war with Vatos Locos.
edges.evidence_quote: Between 2001 and 2003, La Raza was involved in a gang war with Vatos Locos

descriptions: Both recruited child soldiers, but no direct relationship between them.
edges.evidence_quote: A report by the United Nations Secretary General stated that 24 minors under age of 18 had been recruited by the YPG, with 124 having been recruited by the Free Syrian Army and 5 by the Syrian Arab Army.

Dixie Mafia.description: The Dixie Mafia is a criminal organization originating in Biloxi, Mississippi, operating primarily in the southern United States since the 1960s. It is involved in illegal alcohol and drug trafficking, fencing stolen goods, and is characterized by its use of violence. The group evolved from small-time criminals into a structured mafia-style organization under the leadership of Kirksey Nix. It has been linked to contract killings, gambling, and animal fighting.

descriptions: The American Mafia is allied with the Dixie Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... African-American mob , Armenian mafia , Chaldean mafia , Corsican mafia , Dixie Mafia , Greek mafia , Jewish-American mob , Lebanese mafia , Mexican Mafia , Russian mafia , Serbian mafia , various motorcycle gangs (such as the Hells Angels , Outlaws , and Pagan's ) , various street gangs (such as the Bloods , Crips , and Latin Kings )

edges.evidence_quote: la Dixie Mafia trovò sostegno nella mafia italoamericana

descriptions: The Dixie Mafia is allied with the Chicago Outfit.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chicago Outfit , New Orleans crime family

descriptions: The Dixie Mafia was strongly connected to the State Line Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dixie Mafia was strongly connected to the State Line Mob and its leader, Carl Douglas White.

descriptions: Dixie Mafia was initially allied with State Line Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: Inizialmente alleata con la piccola associazione criminale State Line Mob

descriptions: K&A Gang members collaborated with the Dixie Mafia in North Carolina.
edges.evidence_quote: would collaborate with the Dixie Mafia

descriptions: Marcello allowed Dixie Mafia to operate in New Orleans in exchange for a cut of earnings, and outsourced debt collection and contract killing to them.
edges.evidence_quote: The New Orleans family was also closely linked with the Dixie Mafia, initially through Marcello's association with LeRoy Hobbs, the Sheriff of Harrison County, Mississippi. Marcello permitted the Dixie Mafia to operate in New Orleans in exchange for a percentage of that group's earnings and on the condition that Dixie Mafia members avoid the attention of authorities and refrain from encroaching on Marcello's rackets.

Mara Salvatrucha.description: International criminal gang designated as a foreign terrorist organization by the U.S. State Department. Originated in Los Angeles, California, and expanded to the United States, Canada, Mexico, Central America, and Europe. Known for extensive tattoos, hand signs, and extreme violence. Engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, murder, and other crimes. Declined sharply in El Salvador after 2022 under President Nayib Bukele's crackdown.

Kudo-kai.description: The Kudo-kai is a yakuza group headquartered in Kitakyushu, Fukuoka, Japan, founded before WWII as a bakuto organization by Genji Kudo. It is the largest yakuza group in the Kitakyushu area, known for its extremely militant stance and use of machine guns and hand grenades. The group is a member of the anti-Yamaguchi federation Yonsha-kai and has been designated as a particularly nefarious group by the National Police Agency. In 2021, its boss Satoru Nomura became the first designated yakuza boss sentenced to death.

descriptions: Dojin-kai and Kudo-kai are allies per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Kudo-kai, Sinaloa cartel, Taishu-kai, Kumamoto-kai)

descriptions: Fukuhaku-kai has been in conflict with Kudo-kai over attempts to enter Nakasu territory.
edges.evidence_quote: The Fukuhaku-kai has been in conflict with four different Yamaguchi-affiliates over the concessions of Nakasu , the largest red-light district in Kyushu, and also with the Dojin-kai and Kudo-kai over their attempts to enter the same territory.

descriptions: Kudo-kai and Dojin-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kudo-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi fraternal federation, the Yonsha-kai, with three other northern-Kyushu based organizations, the Taishu-kai , Dojin-kai , and Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Kudo-kai and Kumamoto-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kudo-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi fraternal federation, the Yonsha-kai, with three other northern-Kyushu based organizations, the Taishu-kai , Dojin-kai , and Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Kudo-kai annexed Kusano-ikka after prior conflicts.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1987, the Kudo-kai annexed the Kusano-ikka, a Kitakyushu-based yakuza clan which had frequent violent conflicts with the Kudo-kai until then.

descriptions: Kudo-kai and Taishu-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kudo-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi fraternal federation, the Yonsha-kai, with three other northern-Kyushu based organizations, the Taishu-kai , Dojin-kai , and Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Kudo-kai is a designated yakuza group, a subset of Yakuza.
edges.evidence_quote: Kudo-kai is the only one of the designated yakuza to be designated as an especially dangerous designated yakuza

descriptions: Kudo-kai has been in conflict with Yamaguchi-gumi, including killings of Yamaguchi-affiliate bosses.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kudo-kai has been an independent syndicate since its foundation, and has caused numerous conflicts with the Yamaguchi-gumi , for example on eight occasions in 2000 at least one Yamaguchi-affiliate boss has been killed by the Kudo-kai.

descriptions: Kudo-kai is a member of the Yonsha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kudo-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi fraternal federation, the Yonsha-kai, with three other northern-Kyushu based organizations, the Taishu-kai , Dojin-kai , and Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Kyushu Seido-kai was absent from Kudo-kai's president's funeral, indicating no close ties.
edges.evidence_quote: The Seido-kai was the only designated yakuza syndicate absent from this event.

descriptions: Taishu-kai and Kudo-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taishu-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi-gumi fraternal federation, the "Yonsha-kai", along with the Kitakyushu -based Kudo-kai , the Kurume -based Dojin-kai and the Kumamoto -based Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Kudo-kai was suspected of attacking Toa-kai members.
edges.evidence_quote: it was strongly believed that the perpetrators, from the underworld, were those belonging to the Kudo-kai (controlling the Kokura Port) or the Dojin-kai

descriptions: Kudo-kai is part of an anti-Yamaguchi federation, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: the Kudo-kai was a Kyushu-based independent syndicate known as the leading member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation

Peaky Blinders.description: The Peaky Blinders were a street gang based in Birmingham, England, operating from the 1880s to the 1920s. They engaged in robbery, violence, racketeering, illegal bookmaking, and gambling control. The gang was known for their distinctive attire, including flat caps and tailored jackets. They dominated Birmingham's underworld until being overtaken by the Birmingham Boys in 1920.

descriptions: Birmingham Boys overtook Peaky Blinders in 1920.
edges.evidence_quote: They held "control" for 30 years until 1920, when a larger gang, the Birmingham Boys, led by Billy Kimber, overtook them.

descriptions: Sabinis moved into territory after Peaky Blinders withdrew.
edges.evidence_quote: With the Blinders' withdrawal from the criminal underworld, the Sabini gang moved in on the Birmingham Boys gang and solidified political control over Central England in the 1930s.

descriptions: Peaky Blinders fought Sloggers for territory in Birmingham.
edges.evidence_quote: The Blinders' dominance came about from beating rivals, including the "Sloggers", "a pugilistic term for someone who could strike a heavy blow in the ring", whom they fought for territory in Birmingham and its surrounding districts.

edges.source: Keystone Knights of the Ku Klux Klan
descriptions: The Keystone Knights are affiliated with the Aryan Freedom Network.
edges.evidence_quote: the Keystone Knights of the Ku Klux Klan, affiliated with the Aryan Freedom Network

descriptions: The two gangs fought a war over bootlegging control starting in 1926.
edges.evidence_quote: By October 1926, the Birger and Shelton Gangs were in open conflict.

descriptions: Birger joined forces with the Shelton Brothers in 1920 to bootleg.
edges.evidence_quote: Birger initially based his operation in Harrisburg, southern Illinois . The law authorities in Saline County eventually persuaded him to leave, and he built a fortified speakeasy called Shady Rest just across the line in Williamson County .

descriptions: The Shelton Brothers Gang and Charles Birger gang engaged in a war.
edges.evidence_quote: The Shelton Brothers Gang engaged in a war with Charles Birger 's gang that concluded, in 1925, when the Shelton Brothers were convicted of the murder of a mail carrier.

descriptions: The Shelton Brothers joined Birger to attack the Klan.
edges.evidence_quote: In April 1926, Charlie Birger and the Shelton Brothers joined forces to attack the remaining Klan leaders in Herrin, using Tommy guns and shotguns.

descriptions: The Shelton Brothers Gang and Charles Birger gang together fought the Ku Klux Klan.
edges.evidence_quote: The Shelton Brothers Gang and rival Charles Birger gang engaged in a war with the Ku Klux Klan that concluded with a shoot out at Herrin.

descriptions: The Kerryonians fought the Pelters.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kerryonians also fought a gang named the " Pelters ".
